strategy_engine.notes: KuCoin sandbox demo profile. Sandboxed by default: execution_mode per strategy controls sandbox routing, so no live order is placed until KuCoin's gated sandbox write test (HERMX_RUN_KUCOIN_WRITE_TESTS) has proven the venue. Set HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true to enable live execution.

notes: KuCoin sandbox/demo only. New venue stays DISARMED until its gated write test passes.
